1.name: Vexing Tip
1.rules: On a hit, the target has Disadvantage on the next attack roll it makes before the end of its next turn.

1.name: Glow-Stitch
1.rules: The arrow deals no damage but coats the target in bioluminescence. Attacks against the target have Advantage for 1 minute or until it takes a Magic action to wipe it off.

1.name: Tracing Shot
1.rules: You ignore half and three-quarters cover with this attack.

1.name: Slowing Sap
1.rules: The target's Speed is reduced by 10 feet until the start of your next turn.

2.name: Toppling Impact
2.rules: The target must succeed on a DC 13 Strength saving throw or be knocked Prone.

2.name: Pushing Shaft
2.rules: The target must succeed on a DC 13 Strength saving throw or be pushed up to 10 feet away from you.

2.name: Muffled Shank
2.rules: If this hit kills a creature, it dies silently. No sound is produced, and nearby creatures must pass a DC 15 Perception check to notice the death.

2.name: Quick-Draw Balance
2.rules: Firing this arrow costs only a Bonus Action instead of an Action if you have already taken the Attack action.

3.name: Cleaving Broadhead
3.rules: If the attack hits, you can deal the same damage to a second creature within 5 feet of the original target.

3.name: Draining Barb
3.rules: The arrow deals an extra 1d6 Necrotic damage, and you gain Temporary Hit Points equal to the Necrotic damage dealt.

3.name: Blinding Flash
3.rules: The target must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or be Blinded until the end of its next turn.

3.name: Sonic Snap
3.rules: Each creature within 5 feet of the target must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or take 2d6 Thunder damage.

4.name: Pinning Spike
4.rules: The target must succeed on a DC 15 Strength saving throw or have its Speed reduced to 0 (Grappled) as it is pinned to a surface or the ground.

4.name: Corrosive Core
4.rules: The arrow deals an extra 3d6 Acid damage. If the target is wearing nonmagical armor, its AC is permanently reduced by 1.

4.name: Distracting Salvo
4.rules: The target is Incapacitated until the start of your next turn unless it passes a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw.

4.name: Phase Arrow
4.rules: This arrow passes through solid objects. You can target a creature you can't see as long as you know its location, ignoring all cover and shields.

5.name: Exhausting Sting
5.rules: The target must succeed on a DC 16 Constitution saving throw or gain 1 level of Exhaustion.

5.name: Banishment Head
5.rules: The target must succeed on a DC 16 Charisma saving throw or be banished to a harmless demiplane until the end of its next turn.

5.name: Dragon's Hiss
5.rules: The arrow explodes in a 15-foot cone behind the target. Each creature in the area takes 5d6 Fire damage (DC 16 Dex save for half).

5.name: Gravity Well
5.rules: A 10-foot radius sphere of high gravity forms at the impact site. Any creature in the area is Restrained (DC 16 Strength save to escape).
